about.name: Tom Bertomeu
about.subtitle:
Hi! I'm Tom! I am a passionate developer, currently in the 3rd year of a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science (BUT Informatique) and on a work-study program.

I love building web and mobile apps that are not only performant, but above all a joy to use. When I'm not coding, you'll probably find me watching a motorsport race or immersed in a video game.
about.school: Computer Science BUT ⋅ IUT Nord Franche-Comté
